project.name: KIỀU Shop
project.brand: KIỀU - Áo dài cách tân cao cấp (Luxury Vietnamese Fashion)

tech_stack.media: WordPress Media Library + custom AJAX upload fallback

roles_and_capabilities.summary: RBAC system with 2 custom roles + WP Administrator fallback

kieu_sub_admin.label: KIỀU Sub-Admin
kieu_sub_admin.note: Can only edit Lookbook + Banner, support VIP customers

wp_administrator.note: has manage_options → treated as $is_super, can access ALL tabs

important_rules: ALL tab elseif conditions MUST include ($is_super || ...) to allow WP Admin access
wp_enqueue_media() is called directly in page-admin.php before get_header()
CSS and JS are re-enqueued via add_action('wp_enqueue_scripts', fn, priority=5) in page-admin.php
kieuAdminData localized object provides: ajaxUrl, nonce, siteUrl

ajax_handlers.summary: All AJAX handlers in functions.php, use nonce: kieu_admin_nonce

handlers.description: Save any whitelisted WP option (text, image URL)
Upload file to WP Media Library, returns URL + attachment_id
Create or update Lookbook custom post type
Create (product_id=0) or update WooCommerce product. Fields: name, price, sale_price, stock, description, status, thumbnail_id
handlers.note: product_id=0 creates new WC_Product_Simple. Returns product_id in response.

handlers.description: Save VIP customer care note (stored in user meta: kieu_vip_notes)

known_issues_and_fixes.issue: wp.media crashes on frontend with 'activeMode is not a function'
known_issues_and_fixes.cause: JS conflict between media-views.min.js and other scripts
known_issues_and_fixes.fix: Wrap wp.media() call in try-catch. On catch, use static file input fallback (#kadProductImageInput, #kadGeneralImageInput)
known_issues_and_fixes.pattern: openMediaPicker() helper function in admin.js handles this

known_issues_and_fixes.issue: Admin panel tabs show blank page for WP Administrator
known_issues_and_fixes.cause: Tab conditions only checked custom capabilities, not manage_options

known_issues_and_fixes.issue: Media grid empty even with images in WP Media
known_issues_and_fixes.cause: post_mime_type value 'image,video' was too restrictive or wrong format

features.name: Frontend Admin Panel
features.description: Branded frontend admin panel replacing WP Admin for day-to-day management

features.name: Product Inline Editor
features.description: Edit product name/price/stock/desc/status/image directly from products tab

features.name: Add New Product
features.description: Create WooCommerce product from admin panel (product_id=0 creates new)

features.name: Media Uploader
features.description: Drag+drop or file select upload to WP Media. Falls back to file input when wp.media fails

features.name: Size Guide Modal
features.description: Popup on product pages when clicking 'Hướng dẫn chọn size'. Shows uploaded image or default size table. Managed via Settings tab.

features.name: Lookbook CRUD
features.description: Create/edit/delete Lookbook posts from admin panel

features.name: RBAC
features.description: 2 custom roles (kieu_admin, kieu_sub_admin) + WP Admin fallback via $is_super

features.name: VIP Customer Support
features.description: View VIP customers (annual spend > 5M VND), add care notes

features.name: Settings Manager
features.description: Edit contact info, social links, bank account, size guide image/notes

business_rules: Sub-Admin can ONLY edit Lookbook, Banner, and support VIP customers
WP Administrator ($is_super) has access to all admin panel sections
Product create: product_id=0 in AJAX creates new WC_Product_Simple
Size Guide: if kieu_size_guide_image is set, show image; else show default XS-XL table

js_patterns.openMediaPicker: Universal helper in admin.js that tries wp.media first (with try-catch), then falls back to static file input + AJAX upload

static_file_inputs.#kadGeneralImageInput: For banner, homepage, lookbook, and settings image pickers
